# Calipso Web Agency

> Global web agency based in Genova, Italy. We build fast, scalable, legally compliant websites for businesses worldwide.

## About

Calipso is a professional web agency with its legal seat in Genova, Italy (Liguria). We design and develop high-performance websites for clients across Europe, North America, and globally. Our work covers web design, web development, international SEO, e-commerce, GDPR compliance, AI search optimization, and digital infrastructure.

## Services

- **Web Design & Development**: Custom websites built with HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js
- **International SEO & AI Search**: Optimization for Google, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity. Multilingual SEO, hreflang, Schema.org, GEO
- **E-Commerce**: Multi-currency checkout, global tax compliance (OSS/IOSS), international shipping
- **Security & Infrastructure**: Cloudflare CDN/WAF, 2FA, distributed backups, 24/7 monitoring
- **Privacy & Legal (GDPR)**: Cookie banners, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy compliant with EU regulation
- **AI & Innovation**: LLM chatbots, RAG systems, AI search optimization

## Legal & Contact

- **Legal seat**: Genova, Italy (Liguria, IT-GE)
- **Serving**: Clients worldwide — remote process
- **Email**: genovaagencydesign@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://calipsowebagency.it/

## Languages

Available in: Italian (IT), English (EN), Spanish (ES), French (FR), German (DE)

## Compliance

GDPR compliant (European Union General Data Protection Regulation). Site hosted on GitHub Pages (GitHub, Inc., San Francisco, CA, USA).
